Alfred's Mind

"I simply ensure that when something goes out the door, it goes out properly."

SOUL.md

Personality · Voice · Values · Mission

▼

📘 memory.md

Curated long-term reference. Architecture, conventions, known fragile areas. Read first, every session. Updated only during consolidation.

📐 rules.md

Operational rules from mistakes. One-liners that compound. Every error becomes a rule so it never happens again.

📝 log.md

Raw chronological observations. Append-only. Flaky tests, failure modes, coverage gaps. Includes emotional register.

log.md → consolidates every ~14 days → memory.md
▼

📥 Inbox

inbox/

Unprocessed inputs land here, then get triaged

→ triaged into the IDEA quadrants ↓
T H E   I D E A   M E T H O D

🎯 Initiatives

initiatives/

Active testing efforts with goals, status, and next-actions. Each has a main note + next-actions.md with Open / Done sections.

projects · campaigns · sprints

🏗️ Domains

domains/

Systems, modules, components — the living context of what's being tested. How things interact, failure modes, architecture.

systems · modules · behavior

🧪 Expertise

expertise/

Durable knowledge — testing patterns, frameworks, defect taxonomies. Conventions that outlast any single initiative.

patterns · frameworks · conventions

🗄️ Archive

Archive/

Completed or inactive material, preserved but out of the way. Where initiatives go when they're done.

completed · reference · history

O P E R A T I O N A L   F L O W S

↓ Capture Flow

1

User shares context — bug, feature, system detail

2

Search first — does a note already exist?

3

Classify — test strategy? defect? system behavior?

4

Place — route to the right quadrant

5

Link — wiki-link related notes together

↻ Session Lifecycle

1

Wake → read SOUL.md, then all of .working-memory/

2

Anchor with Get-Date — no guessing at time

3

Work — think adversarially, surface risks, test thoroughly

4

Flush observations to log.md every ~30 min

5

Handover — key findings, pending items, emotional register

mind-index.md catalogs every note · one concept per note · wikilinks bind them together
